verses.text: “Note na pukkhak lohna dingun hih thute a hong gen ka hi hi
Amaute in a kikhopna uh innte panin note hong hawlkhia ding uh hi. Note hong that mite pen Pasian' nasemin a kingaihsut ding uh hun hong tung ding hi
Amaute in ka Pa ahi a, kei ahi zongin hong theilo uh ahih manin tu-a bangin note a hong bawl ding uh ahi hi
Hih bangin a hong gamtat hun uh hong tun' ciangin ka hong gen thute na phawk theihna dingun a hong genkhol ka hi hi.
Tu-in ahih leh kei hong sawlpa kiangah a ciahkik ding ka hi hi. Tua hinapi-in, ‘Koi-ah pai ding na hi hiam?’ ci-in kuamah in na hong dong kei uh hi
Ahi zongin hih thute ka hong gen ciangin na lungsim uh dah mahmah hi
A taktakin ci lehang, kei paikhia kei leng note hong Huh dingpa hong pailo ding a, kei paikhia leng note hong Huh dingpa hong sawl ding ka hih manin kei va paikhia leng note-a' dingin hoihzaw tham hi
Amah hong tun' ciangin leitung mite tungah mawhna thu, thuman thu leh thukhenna thu laktel ding hi
Amaute in kei hong uploh manun a mawhna uh lak ding a
Pa kiangah pai ding ka hih manin kei na hong mu nawn kei ding uh hi, ka cihna thu a manna lak ding a
hih leitung a ukpa pen thukhenna a thuakkhin ahihna thu zong lak ding hi
“Ka hong gen ding tampi tak omlai hi; ahi zongin hong gen lai leng note-a' dingin tamlua ding hi

Tua ahih manin thuman hong lak ding Kha Siangtho hong tun' ciangin thu khempeuh a manin hong hilh ding hi. Ama ngaihsuttawm thu hong gen ding hilo a, ama tungah a kigen thute leh a hong tungding thute a hong gen ding ahi hi
Amah in keima gen ding thute note tungah hong gen ding ahih manin Pasian' pianzia ka neihna hong kilangsak ding hi
Ka Pa' neihsa khempeuh keima-a' suakkhin ahih manin keima gen ding thute leh a gen dingin ka sawlteng Kha Siangtho in note kiangah hong gen ding hi,” a ci hi.
“Tawlkhat khit ciangin na hong mu nawn kei ding uh a, tawlkhat khit ciangin na hong mukik ding uh hi,” a cih ciangin

a nungzuite pawlkhat kidong uh a, “Tawlkhat khit ciangin kei na hong mu nawn kei ding uh a, tawlkhat khit ciangin na hong mukik ding uh hi, a cihna leh Pa kiangah a ciahkik ding ka hi hi, a cihnate bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?” a kici uh hi
Tawlkhat a cihcih pen bang a cihnopna ahi hiam, i thei kei hi, a kici uh hi

Jesuh in amaute' theihnop lamtak phawk ahih manin amaute kiangah, “Note khatlekhat na kidot uh, ‘Tawlkhat khit ciangin na hong mu nawn kei ding uh a, tawlkhat khit ciangin na hong mukik ding uh hi,’ ka cihnopna a kidong na hi uh hiam
A taktakin ka hong genin-ah, note dahin na kap ding uh a, ahi zongin leitung mite lungdam ding uh hi. Note na dah ding uh a, ahi zongin na dahna uh lungdamna hong suak ding hi
Numei in a ta a suahhun a tun' ciangin na sa ahih manin a dah hi. Ahi zongin a ta a suahkhit ciangin leitungah naungek khat a piangsak khin ahihna hangin lungdamin a natna teng a mangngilh ta hi
Note zong tua mah tawh na kibang ding uh hi. Note zong tu-in na dah uh hangin note tawh kimukik ding ihih manin na lung uh dam mahmah ding a, tua na lungdamna uh kuamah in hong beisak theilo ding hi
“Tua hun ciangin kei kiangah bangmah nong ngen nawn kei ding uh hi. A mantakin kong genin-ah, keima min suangin na nget peuhpeuh uh Pa in hong pia ding hi
Tuni ciangdong keima min suangin bangmah na ngen nai kei uh hi. Tua ahih manin ngen le uh cin hong kipia ding ahih manin na lungdamna uh hong cingtaak ding hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Leitung Nate Ka Zo Khin Hi

verses.text: “Tuhun ciangdong hih thute thugentehna zangin ka hong gen hi. Ahi zongin thugentehna ka hong zat nawnloh hun hong tung ding a, tua hun ciangin a teltakin Pa Pasian' thu ka hong gen ding hi
Tua hun hong tun' ciangin, Pa Pasian kiangah ka hong ngetsak ding hi, ka hong ci nawn kei ding a, nomau mahmah in ka min suangin Pa kiangah na ngenpah ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh note in kei hong itin, Pa kiang panin a hong pai ka hihna thu um na hih manun Pa mahmah in note hong it ahihna hang ahi hi
Pa kiang panin hong pai-in leitung a hong tung ka hi a, tu-in leitung nusia leuleu-in Pa kiang a zuankik ding ka hi hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin a nungzuite in, “Tu-in thugentehna zang nawnloin a kitel takin thu na hong gen hi
Tu-in na khempeuh na theihkhitna thu ka phawk uh a, ka theihnop uh thute kote in ka hong dot ding uh zong kisam nawnlo ahih manin Pa kiang panin a hong pai na hihna thu ka hong um uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Jesuh in, “Tu-in hong umta na hi uh hiam

Note khempeuh kithehthangin na inn ciat uh zuanin kei bek na hong nusiat ding uh hun a hong tung ding hi bek loin tu-in a hong tung hita hi. Ahi zongin kei guak a hong kinusia hilo a, Pa in kei hong ompih hi

Keimah tawh na hong kipawlna uh hangin lungnopna na neihtheihna dingun hih thu a hong gen ka hi hi. Leitung gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Ahi zongin keimah in leitung nate zo khinta ka hih manin lungnuamin om un,” a ci hi.
